reason: Verified that the agent can successfully execute browser tools to navigate to https://example.com and report that the page title is "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Gamut application with agent list
Located and clicked on "QA-20260622-190139-2ihy" agent in the main content area — Agent page loaded with configuration panel and message input field
Clicked on the message input field and typed "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was successfully entered into the textbox
Clicked the "Send message" button to submit the message — Message was sent, new session "Browser Navigation and Page Title Check" was created, and agent status changed to "working"

Waited up to 3 minutes for response containing "Example Domain" — Agent completed execution in 14 seconds with successful tool calls (Open Browser, Browser Get State, Close Browser) and reported: "The page title is "Example Domain""
Took final screenshot to verify the response — Screenshot shows the complete agent response clearly displaying "Example Domain" as the page title
